label: DL2_NEURON
tissue_context: spinal cord (alar plate, dorsal neural tube)
evidence: HDCA Supplementary Table 9 assigns DL2_NEURON to broad_celltype CNS_SPINAL_NEURON, systems NERVOUS_SYSTEM, CL term CL:0000540. Top gene signature (DCX,NGFR,INA,CNTN2,STMN2,ELAVL3,HOXD3,HOXB2,HOXA3,POU2F2,SNCG,CRABP1,MAP6,TUBB4A,KIF5C,DPYSL4,INSM1,NHLH1,SHD,STMN4) matches canonical dI2 (Class A roof-plate-dependent commissural interneuron) markers documented in Lu 2015, Castellani 2013, Gray de Cristoforis 2020.
